name: Ernestine Stevens
ai_summary: Ernestine Stevens is a 56-year-old Atlanta resident with 19 years of informal childcare experience raising eight children and cousins, available full or part-time with a 50-mile travel radius. She brings a fun, artsy approach to working with kids and resolves conflicts by separating children to understand situations and restore harmony.
